Title: Drip of Qud
Description:
Adds [b]13[/b] articles of miscellaneous clothing and equipment (most of which can be purchased from various Stilt merchants).

Also adds [b]spray dye[/b], allowing you to recolor items (these can also be purchased at the Stilt).

[url=https://github.com/Klehrik/CoQ-DripofQud]GitHub[/url]
